summary: Added first-class multi-agent Antigravity and Claude Code architecture to SpecBridge, defining Governor, Coordinator, Executor, Reviewer, scope ownership, branching, evidence, merge, and product requirements for parallel agent work.
policy_result: Passed. Changes are documentation and governance architecture only. No runtime product code, secrets, production configuration, deployment automation, billing, hosted dashboard implementation, MCP server implementation, GitHub App implementation, branch protection weakening, CI/CD security weakening, or runtime product code are included.
risk_result: Low risk documentation and architecture change. All required local validations passed.
unresolved_risks: Runtime multi-agent orchestration remains future work until a dedicated execution contract authorizes source paths and tests.
CI evidence is pending until the branch is pushed and GitHub runs checks.
